Post Comment
Jewel Crafting
QuoteReply
# Dec 11 2008 at 8:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591953708424
4 posts
Any jewelers know how to cut a Round Cut Pearl? Suppose to give 12 STA but I have yet to figure out how to cut it. Thanks in advance for any info.
▲ Page top
Pearl
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2005 at 7:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591832725691
View User Forum
9 posts
Can also be found on an ice giant in Everfrost Peaks.
▲ Page top
Where to buy Pearl.
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2005 at 3:19 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1594573301271
View User Forum
Guru
546 posts
Sold in PoK for around 5pp. Kirem Deepfacet has them for sale.

▲ Page top
Another location
QuoteReply
# May 03 2003 at 11:55 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788173499
Scholar
20 posts
Paulina In East Karana's. She is in one of the farms near the bridge - loc neg. 729, neg. 188

Correction... Bought so many pearls of her that she ran out of it. I guess somebody was selling pearls to her that he got as a drop from mobs.

Edited, Sun May 4 04:19:52 2003
▲ Page top
Where to Buy ??
QuoteReply
# May 02 2003 at 12:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788173499
Scholar
20 posts
Instead of hunting all kind of creatures you can buy them at the following location.
Zone : Shadow Heaven
Name NPC : Eriska Malosona
Loc : 1178, 43
No. on map of eqatlas.com : 3a
Price : 5 Plat-9 Gold-3 Silver-1 Copper (Char 50)

Then I did the druid trick of sitting behind her, sneak and hold 2 Opal Crusted Stein (CHA+25). The price dropped a lot : 4 Plat-7 Gold-8 Silver-7 Copper.

I hope this information helps ya.
▲ Page top
